notes: Source PDF for I1 ITU IDI 2024 indicator. The official ITU IDI dataset Excel is auth-gated; the public report PDF carries the same per-country scores in Table 1. The PDF is parsed to text via `pdftotext -layout` into itu_idi_2024_report.txt, then extract_idi_from_pdf.py parses the table into itu_idi_2024.csv.
